short_summary: Iran deal may ease energy costs
rationale: For Portugal, the main relevant thread remains the potential Iran deal and its effect on EU energy prices; no Iberian-specific events this cycle.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could lower EU energy prices, benefiting Portuguese households and businesses, but deal fragility and ongoing strikes limit optimism.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US AI restrictions have limited but non-zero relevance for Portuguese tech users and businesses relying on US AI services.

top_events.title: Switzerland population cap vote
top_events.summary: Switzerland's referendum on capping population at 10 million is a minor EU-adjacent political event with negligible direct impact on Portugal.
